decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id project_12-webster-ave matches an existing registry record with display_name 'Webster Avenue Select Bus Service'. The source_id 2013_01_webster_sbs_newsletter is already listed in the registry record's source_ids, and the alias project_webster-ave-sbs-2013-01 is already present. The observation resolves to its own registry record with no different record to link to.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Select Bus Service (SBS) coming to Webster Avenue
